Official daisyUI skill. Resources for LLM on how to use daisyUI components, colors and themes.
Make a daisyUI pricing card, use daisyUI skill
Run the command `npx skills add saadeghi/daisyui` in your terminal. After install, prompt like "Make a daisyUI pricing card, use daisyUI skill" to generate your first component.
Yes, this skill is free to use. We want to provide this resource for everyone who wants to use daisyUI with their LLM.
This skill is licensed under the MIT License.
Can I contribute to this skill?
Yes, contributions are welcome! You can open a pull request on GitHub. Please make sure to follow the contribution guidelines and code of conduct.

The ultimate expert in dashboard design. This skill includes all the knowledge, instructions, resources and design taste from daisyUI Nexus. We created this skill so your LLM can generate any dashboard UI with the same quality as Nexus Dashboard.
Expert in generating layouts and UI blocks for dashboards and admin panels, based on daisyUI style

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="44" viewBox="0 0 40 44" fill="none"><g clip-path="url(#clip0_656_249)"><g clip-path="url(#clip1_656_249)"><path d="M12.7297 29.1088C15.9028 26.4463 20.6335 26.8602 23.296 30.0333C25.9585 33.2063 25.5446 37.937 22.3716 40.5995C19.1985 43.262 14.4678 42.8481 11.8053 39.6751C9.1428 36.502 9.55668 31.7714 12.7297 29.1088Z" fill="#7257FF" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#7257FF" stroke-width="3.25" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M35.5527 19.7487L23.2959 30.0332" stroke="#7257FF" stroke-width="3.25" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M15.3311 3.42839C12.1581 6.0909 11.7442 10.8216 14.4067 13.9946C17.0692 17.1677 21.7999 17.5816 24.9729 14.9191C28.146 12.2565 28.5599 7.52587 25.8974 4.35281C23.2348 1.17975 18.5042 0.765873 15.3311 3.42839Z" fill="#636EFF" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#636EFF" stroke-width="3.25" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M2.15009 24.2793L14.4067 13.9946" stroke="#636EFF" stroke-width="3.25" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g></g><defs><linearGradient id="paint0_linear_656_249" x1="51.5137" y1="-1.59929" x2="235.884" y2="43.0696" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop stop-color="#4B7EFF"/><stop offset="0.995417" stop-color="#7C4CFE"/></linearGradient><clipPath id="clip0_656_249"><rect width="233" height="44" fill="white"/></clipPath><clipPath id="clip1_656_249"><rect width="64.5597" height="65.0528" fill="white" transform="translate(-26.7571 17.2483) rotate(-40)"/></clipPath></defs></svg>
Follow the instructions in the README file included in the package. If you have any questions, you can ask in the Discord server https://daisyui.com/discord and we will help you.
Yes, you pay once and you can use the product forever. No subscription, no monthly fees, no hidden costs.
You will receive an email with the download link. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.

All packages will receive bug fixes as long as they are available on the store. We will also add new versions and dependency updates if needed. You can download the latest version from the link you received in the email, or from https://www.creem.io/my-orders/login
We offer support via Discord. You can join the server https://daisyui.com/discord and ask your questions there. We will do our best to help you.

If there was an issue with the product, send an email to help@daisyui.com so I can help you. I will do my best to resolve the issue. We don't offer refunds for digital products, however if there was a mistake in payment, for example if you paid twice for the same product, send an email to help@daisyui.com and I will refund the extra payment.
Please check your spam folder. If you still can't find it, send an email to help@daisyui.com so I can help you.
Send me an email at help@daisyui.com and I will help you get the right package.
There was an issue with the payment

If the payment failed and you didn't receive the product, it usually means the payment didn't go through. Please try again. If the money was deducted from your account, it will be refunded automatically within a week or two. If the issue persists, send an email to help@daisyui.com so I can help you.
A big collection of beautiful charts examples, made with ApexCharts and daisyUI. Visual demos, code examples and skill files included.
Expert in generating all kind of charts and graphs, based on daisyUI style
